timing_table.reason: Fat-soluble — needs dietary fat for ~50% better absorption
Prevents nausea; spaced 4–5 hrs from Magnesium to avoid Zn/Mg absorption competition
Leucine delivery during anabolic window. With water or milk.
Reduces GI side effects; sleep benefit via GABA modulation
Fat-soluble; better absorbed with a fat-containing meal
Slow-release casein for overnight muscle protein synthesis

current_products.name: Doppelherz Vitamin D3 2000 IU
current_products.mechanism: D3 is the active form (vs D2). Supports calcium absorption, immune function, and muscle protein synthesis.
current_products.note: Hamburg at 53°N — virtually zero Vitamin D synthesis October–April.
current_products.interactions: Take in the morning. Do not take within 2 hours of Magnesium.

current_products.name: Abtei Magnesium 500 Plus (mit allen B-Vitaminen, Biotin 150 µg, B12 20 µg)
current_products.mechanism: Magnesium supports ATP synthesis, muscle contraction/relaxation, and sleep via GABA modulation. Biotin supports hair keratin production. B12 supports red blood cell formation for running stamina.
current_products.note: If loose stools occur, split dose (morning + evening).
current_products.interactions: Do not take within 2 hours of Vitamin D3. Space Zinc by 4–5 hours.

current_products.name: Mivolis Zink 15 mg + Histidin + Cystein
current_products.dosage: 1 tablet with lunch (with food, never on empty stomach)
current_products.mechanism: Zinc 15 mg hits the evidence-based sweet spot for hair follicle health and testosterone synthesis without risking copper depletion (which occurs at sustained >40 mg/day). Histidine chelates zinc, improving intestinal absorption by ~30% vs zinc alone and stabilising it in plasma. Cysteine is a sulphur-containing amino acid and a key building block of keratin — directly supports hair shaft structure and reduces oxidative damage to the follicle. This combination is meaningfully better than plain zinc gluconate for hair-specific goals.
current_products.note: Mivolis is the dm house brand — solid bioavailability, good value. Do not double-dose thinking more = better: excess zinc competes with copper absorption and can paradoxically worsen hair loss.
current_products.interactions: Space 4–5 hours from Magnesium (absorption competition). Take with food to prevent nausea. Iron supplements (if ever added) should also be spaced 2+ hours away.

current_products.name: Omega-3 (EPA+DHA)
current_products.dosage: 2–3 g EPA+DHA/day with dinner (take with the fat-containing meal)
current_products.mechanism: EPA and DHA are incorporated into cell membrane phospholipids, reducing pro-inflammatory eicosanoid production (COX/LOX pathway). For your goals: (1) Muscle — omega-3 activates mTORC1 signalling, augmenting muscle protein synthesis by ~50% when combined with resistance training. (2) Hair — improves scalp sebum fatty acid profile, reducing follicle inflammation; clinical trials show reduced hair shedding and increased density at 2–3 g/day. (3) Skin — restores ceramide-like lipids in the stratum corneum, directly addressing dry skin barrier dysfunction. (4) Running recovery — reduces delayed-onset muscle soreness (DOMS) and exercise-induced inflammation.
current_products.note: Check your product's label for actual EPA+DHA content per capsule — many budget brands list total fish oil (e.g. 1000 mg), but EPA+DHA is only 300 mg of that. Dose to the EPA+DHA number, not total oil. If the product has <500 mg EPA+DHA per capsule, you may need 4–6 capsules to hit the 2 g target.
current_products.interactions: Take with dinner for best absorption. No significant drug interactions at standard doses. If you ever take blood thinners, flag to a doctor — but irrelevant at your age without prescriptions.

missing_supplements.name: Whey Protein
missing_supplements.mechanism: At 59 kg targeting muscle gain, 130–145 g protein/day is needed. Difficult from food alone. Leucine threshold ~2.5 g per meal triggers muscle protein synthesis.
missing_supplements.where: Lidl: Beavita/Powerstar. dm: ESN Whey. iHerb: ON Gold Standard.

missing_supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate
missing_supplements.mechanism: Most-studied ergogenic aid. Increases phosphocreatine stores, enabling more reps per set. Accelerates lean muscle gain by ~20% vs training alone. Safe at all studied doses.
